mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, case_count, success_rate, avg_rating, response_efficiency_score, service_tags, budget_tags FROM agency_member_metrics WHERE member_id = #{memberId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agency_member_metrics(member_id, case_count, success_rate, avg_rating, response_efficiency_score, service_tags, budget_tags) VALUES(#{memberId}, #{caseCount}, #{successRate}, #{avgRating}, #{responseEfficiencyScore}, #{serviceTags}, #{budgetTags}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE case_count = VALUES(case_count), success_rate = VALUES(success_rate), avg_rating = VALUES(avg_rating), response_efficiency_score = VALUES(response_efficiency_score), service_tags = VALUES(service_tags), budget_tags = VALUES(budget_tags)
